NMA_CONFIG.outcome_label: Cardiovascular death or hospitalisation for heart failure (primary composite, trial-specific primary endpoint)
NMA_CONFIG.note: k=6 Pbo-controlled Phase 3 trials; each SGLT2i has 2 direct Pbo-anchored trials (precision-adequate). Network is a Pbo-star (no closed loops). Indirect Dapa-vs-Empa, Dapa-vs-Sota, Empa-vs-Sota contrasts computed through the Pbo anchor. Consistency test not defined in star-only networks; report pairwise direct estimates + indirect contrasts with explicit declaration.

title: RapidMeta HIV | HIV ART Initiation Timing NMA — START + TEMPRANO + HPTN 052 v0.1
